title: phanera outimouta
intro: Phanera outimouta, also known as the "Golden Rain Tree," is a plant species belonging to the family Moraceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Phanera outimouta include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
